/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -dynamiclib -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -current_version 0.9.8 -o libggml-blas.0.9.8.dylib -install_name @rpath/libggml-blas.0.dylib "CMakeFiles/ggml-blas.dir/ggml-blas_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/ggml-blas.dir/ggml-blas.cpp.o"  -Wl,-rpath,/Users/zhaopeng.charles/code/magechiu/aiplayer/build/macos/_deps/whispercpp-build/ggml/src ../libggml-base.0.9.8.dylib -Xlinker -framework -Xlinker Accelerate
